questionHtml: Describe the energy change that takes place for t > 3.0 s.
markschemeHtml:
«gravitational» potential energy «of the raindrop» into thermal/internal energy «of the air» ✓

 

Accept heat for thermal energy.

Accept into kinetic energy of air particles.

Ignore sound energy.

meta.title: Describe the energy change that takes place for t > 3.0 s.
